summary: A comprehensive, definitive Members' Voluntary Liquidation (MVL) report for Philip Harrison and Los Romeros Limited, synthesising deep research from both Google Gemini Pro 3.1 and Claude Sonnet 4.6. Covers the full 7-stage MVL process with statutory forms, cross-border tax obligations (FTCR, phantom gains), BADR eligibility, TAAR anti-avoidance rules, updated CGT rates for 2025/26, IP selection criteria, financial cost modelling, risk register, and a prioritised action plan with a definitive timeline through to dissolution.
